title: A Day at The Haberdashery
opening: Good morning! Welcome to 'The Haberdashery'. Are you looking for anything in particular, or just having a browse today?

t1.prompt: Good morning! Welcome to 'The Haberdashery'. Are you looking for anything in particular, or just having a browse today?
t1.promptTranslation: Good morning! Welcome to 'The Haberdashery'. Are you looking for anything in particular, or just having a browse today? (Good morning! Welcome to our store. What can I help you find today?)

t2_specific.prompt: Certainly. What kind of item did you have in mind? Perhaps a smart casual shirt or something for a special occasion?
t2_specific.promptTranslation: Certainly. What kind of item did you have in mind? Perhaps a smart casual shirt or something for a special occasion? (Of course. What item are you interested in? A shirt or a dress for an event?)

t2_browse.prompt: Absolutely, feel free to take your time. We've just received a stunning new collection of autumnal wear, or perhaps our accessories might pique your interest.
t2_browse.promptTranslation: Absolutely, feel free to take your time. We'
